name: Outbreak: Beyond The City
description:
[Two years after "Day 0"]

Set in Montana, a father and a son try to stay afloat. The past and what the outbreak took from them still haunt their lives, but they keep fighting, hoping for a better future.

During a trip to the nearest town in search of supplies, they encounter a survivor walking on the roadside. Will they be able to trust them? Will they mean trouble? Or perhaps, they will mark a new chapter in their lives.

They will soon find out.

Meet Marcus, 44, trying to keep what he has left of his family safe. And his son, David, 19, who´s stuck in the past and doesn't know how to move on.

<If there was a song playing, it would probably be "No Surprises, from Radiohead">

[ART]
